title: Semester-End Examination Decision Flow
description: A flowchart guiding a student through the preparation process and requirements for the Discrete Mathematical Structures final exam on Group Theory.
elements: Understand Core Definitions (Group, Abelian Group, Subgroup)
Master Key Theorems (Lagrange's Theorem, Cyclic Groups)
relationships: Sequential flow from preparation start to exam execution, with core topics and practice as essential intermediate steps
